title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI team productivity and error rates. The video contends that dynamic languages like Python create friction in AI projects through runtime mistakes, and recommends TypeScript for its type checking, LSP support, and modular architecture benefits.
